---
name: Feature request
about: Got an idea? Tell us what you'd like to see.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
<!-- What are you trying to do that Kurious doesn't support today? -->

**What would you like Kurious to do?**
<!-- Describe the feature or behaviour you'd like. Be as specific as you can. -->

**How would you use it?**
<!-- A quick example — code, a query, a workflow — helps us understand the use case. -->

**Anything else?**
<!-- Modality, scale, urgency, or anything else that gives us context. -->
